home.heroTitle: Quality Baby Products for Happy Families
home.heroSubtitle: Safe, thoughtfully designed products that support your baby's growth and make parenting easier.
home.safetyFirstText: All products are BPA-free, non-toxic, and tested to meet international safety standards.
home.thoughtfulDesignText: Every product is designed with real parents and babies in mind, ensuring comfort and usability.
home.builtToLastText: Durable materials and quality construction mean our products grow with your family.
home.readyToExploreText: Browse our complete collection and find the perfect products for your little one.

about.title: About Taizhou City Huangyan Oya Plastic Factory
about.subtitle: Over 20 Years of Excellence in Baby Feeding Solutions
about.intro: Established in {year}, Taizhou City Huangyan Oya Plastic Factory is a professional manufacturer specializing in baby feeding bottles, sippy cups, tableware, and related baby products. With over {experience} years of experience, we have developed deep expertise in plastic injection molding, especially {materials} materials. Our commitment to quality and innovation has made us a trusted partner for brands worldwide.
about.manufacturingText: All manufacturing and packaging processes are completed in-house, ensuring high-quality items for all clients. Our integrated production approach allows us to maintain strict quality control at every stage—from raw material inspection to final packaging.
about.oem: Original Equipment Manufacturing for well-known brands
about.odm: Original Design Manufacturing with custom product development
about.certificationsIntro: Our products meet international quality standards. We are proud to hold the following certifications that demonstrate our commitment to excellence.
about.ctaText: We warmly welcome customers to visit our factory for on-site audits and inspections. Experience our manufacturing capabilities firsthand and discover why we are the trusted choice for baby product solutions.
about.ctaClosing: Looking forward to be your partner!

feedingBottles.title: Baby Feeding Bottles
feedingBottles.description: Premium feeding bottles designed for safe, comfortable feeding. BPA-free materials with anti-colic technology for your baby's wellbeing.

sippyCups.title: Baby Sippy Cups
sippyCups.description: Safe and durable sippy cups for babies learning to drink independently. Available in various materials and designs.

tableware.title: Baby Tableware
tableware.description: Child-friendly plates, bowls, and utensils designed for safe and enjoyable mealtime experiences.

bathPotty.title: Baby Bath & Potty
bathPotty.description: Comfortable and safe bathing and potty training products for babies and toddlers.

milkPowderContainer.title: Milk Powder Container
milkPowderContainer.description: Portable milk powder containers and formula dispensers for convenient feeding on-the-go. Multi-layer designs for accurate portioning.

accessories.title: Other Accessories
accessories.description: Essential baby care accessories including teethers, pacifiers, bottle brushes, breast pumps, and more to complete your baby care kit.
